title: Pull Request Review Context
description: Normalized, provider-neutral description of a Pull Request or Merge Request, produced by review-pr and consumed by code-review via --input. Contains no findings and no verdict: review-pr never analyzes code.

provider.description: Detected provider. Must be determined reliably; never guessed.

host.description: Provider host, for self-hosted GitLab or GitHub Enterprise, e.g. 'gitlab.acme.internal'. Null for the public cloud instance.

id.description: The PR/MR number as shown in the provider UI. For GitLab this is the per-project iid, not the global id.

title.description: PR title. Context only - a claim to verify against the diff, not a fact.

description.description: PR body. Context only - a claim to verify against the diff, not a fact.

author.description: Provider username or handle of the PR author.

url.description: Web URL of the PR, for display and for citing in the review.

baseBranch.description: Target branch the PR merges into, e.g. 'dev'.

baseSha.description: Verified base commit - the merge base of the base branch and headSha, not the base branch tip. Full SHA preferred; Bitbucket short hashes must be expanded locally before use.

headSha.description: Verified head commit actually checked out and reviewed. Must equal `git rev-parse HEAD` in the review worktree.

changedFiles.description: Repository-relative paths changed by the PR. Must be the complete list - a truncated or unpaginated list silently narrows the review.

isDraft.description: Draft/WIP status. Bitbucket Cloud has no draft concept; use false there.

reviewMode.description: 'full' reviews baseSha...headSha. 'incremental' reviews previousReviewedSha...headSha and re-checks unresolved blocking findings.

previousReviewedSha.description: Head SHA of the previous AI review, read from the comment state marker. Null when never reviewed. Must be reachable in the local repository; if it is not (force-push, rebase, squash), fall back to reviewMode 'full'.

reviewVersion.description: Incremented on each re-review of the same PR. Written back into the comment state marker.

previousBlockingFindingIds.description: Blocking finding ids from the previous review that were not confirmed resolved. Re-checked against current code in incremental mode.

checkoutPath.description: Path of the review worktree, e.g. '.review-worktrees/pr-123'. Null when reviewed in place in a clean working tree.

base.description: Compatibility field for code-review --input. Must equal baseSha.

head.description: Compatibility field for code-review --input. Must equal headSha.
